case_title: JEREMY HOWARD ET AL VS. ANTHONY GOLDBLOOM ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-28-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 65609428)

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, JEREMY , AN INDIVIDUAL GRUEN, NICHOLAS , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDBLOOM, ANTHONY , AN INDIVIDUAL FONTANA, ASH , AN INDIVIDUAL FEENY, CURTIS , AN INDIVIDUAL HAMNER, BENJAMIN , AN INDIVIDUAL ZETTA VENTURE PARTNERS I, L.P. , A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VOYAGER CAPITAL FUND IV, L.P. , A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP DOES 1 THROUGH 25, INCLUSIVE VOYAGER CAPITAL FOUNDERS' FUND IV, L.P. , A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-28-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-28-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-05-2018

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT * ON SEPTEMBER 29, 2017 DUPLICATE COMPLAINTS WERE FILED IN ERROR (CASE NOS. CGC-17-561624 & CGC-17-561644). PLAINTIFFS ARE DISMISSING WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THIS COMPLAINT, WHICH IS THE CASE WITH THE HIGHER CASE NUMBER. * (TRANSACTION ID # 100029953)
